title: Correcting terminology to align the revised code of Washington with recent reorganization at the department of social and health services.
summary: Correcting terminology to align the revised code of Washington with recent reorganization at the department of social and health services.

actions.action: First reading, referred to Early Learning & Human Services.
Public hearing in the House Committee on Early Learning & Human Services at 1:30 PM.
Executive action taken in the House Committee on Early Learning & Human Services at 1:30 PM.
ELHS - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
Returned to Rules Committee for second reading.

votes.description: House Committee on Early Learning & Human Services: 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass
